oracle_loo_note: Full forward pass per edge, uses true labels. AUC=0.786 with -L (cross-class edges have negative L).
failure_reasons: GCN BatchNorm makes linear LOO approximation inaccurate
Pseudo labels from teacher (~78% acc) add noise that overwhelms LOO signal
Removing one edge from degree-10 node changes hidden by ~10%, too small
Cross-class and same-class edges overlap heavily in feature space
